---
title: "African Oystercatcher Distribution, Western Cape"
author: Amber Charman
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Download iNaturalist data into R
```{r download inat data}

# install rinat enables downloading iNaturalsit data into R

library(rinat)

## Download African oystercatcher observations
oyster<-get_inat_obs(taxon_name="Haematopus moquini", bounds= c(-35, 17, -31, 25), 
                     maxresults = 2000)
```
## Filter to the Western Cape region
```{r}

library(tidyverse)

# keep only good quality observations in the Western Cape
oyster <- oyster %>% 
  filter(latitude >= -34.83 & latitude <= -32.11,  # Western Cape bounds
         longitude >= 18.02 & longitude <= 23.11) %>%
  filter(quality_grade == "research",               # Only research grade
         !is.na(latitude),                           # Must have location
         !is.na(longitude))

```

## Turning data into spatial object

```{r}

library(sf)
oyster_sf <- st_as_sf(oyster, 
                    coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), 
                    crs = 4326)

oyster_sf <- st_transform(oyster_sf, crs = 32734)

print(paste("Created spatial object with", nrow(oyster_sf), "points"))
```

## Make a simple map
```{r}

library(ggplot2)
library(ggspatial)

#create the map
ggplot() + 
  annotation_map_tile(type = "osm", progress = "none") +
  geom_sf(data = oyster_sf, color = "darkred", size = 2)
```
## Make an interactive map
```{r}

library(mapview)
library(leafpop)
oyster_wgs84 <- st_transform(oyster_sf, crs = 4326)

oyster_popup <- oyster %>%
  mutate(click_url = paste0("<b><a href='", url, "' target='_blank'>Link to iNat observation</a></b>"))

mapview(oyster_wgs84,
        popup = popupTable(oyster_popup,
                          zcol = c("user_login", "captive_cultivated", "click_url")))
```




```{r}
library(leaflet)
leaflet(oyster_wgs84) %>%
  addTiles(group = "OSM") %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron", group = "Positron") %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    radius = 5,
    color = "darkred",
    popup = ~paste(
      "<b>Observer:</b>", user_login, "<br>",
      "<b>Date:</b>", observed_on, "<br>",
      "<b><a href='", url, "' target='_blank'>View on iNaturalist</a></b>"
    )
  ) %>%
  addLayersControl(baseGroups = c("OSM", "Positron"))

```

```{r}
# Check filtering
cat("Quality grade values:", unique(oyster$quality_grade), "\n")
cat("Captive cultivated values:", unique(oyster$captive_cultivated), "\n")

# Count what im keeping
oyster_filtered <- oyster %>% 
  filter(quality_grade == "research",
         captive_cultivated == "false")

cat("Observations after filtering:", nrow(oyster_filtered), "\n")
```
```{r}
# Make sure oyster_sf has the year column
oyster_sf <- oyster_sf %>%
  mutate(year = year(observed_on))

# Static map with color by year
ggplot() + 
  annotation_map_tile(type = "osm", progress = "none") +
  geom_sf(data = oyster_sf, 
          aes(color = year),  # Color by year!
          size = 2.5, 
          alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_color_gradient(name = "Year",
                       low = "yellow", 
                       high = "darkred") +
  labs(title = "African Oystercatcher Distribution Over Time",
       subtitle = "Western Cape, South Africa",
       x = "Longitude",
       y = "Latitude") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))
```

```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Set CRAN mirror
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cran.rstudio.com/"))
```
